## Site Overview

**Name:** The Armchair Futurist

**Core Focus:** AI Technical Literacy & Personal Leverage

---

## Key Statistics

- 40+ AI systems deployed across organizations
- 10-20 hours reclaimed per week per client
- 5+ hours/week guaranteed time savings for implementation clients
- 6 professional certifications
- 4.9/5 client rating from 40+ engagements
- 1-on-1 AI Guidance from $120/session
- 14 weeks avg time to 80% adoption
- 72% cite workflow redesign as top barrier
- 67% pilot-only failure rate
- 92% voluntary adoption in 90 days (healthcare case)
- $185K annual savings (SaaS case)
- 3.2x ROI in 6 months (consulting firm case)

---

## Core Concepts

### The Accountability Gap
https://thearmchairfuturist.com/concepts/accountability-gap
The space between AI outputs and business results. Fix: assign a Human Architect.
Stats: 72% cite workflow redesign. 67% of pilots never scale. 14 weeks to 80% adoption.

### Psychology-Led Adoption
https://thearmchairfuturist.com/concepts/psychology-led-adoption
Addresses human barriers before technical ones. 3x faster adoption.
Profiles: Results Thinkers (5%), Process Guardians (~25%), Adapters (~70%).

### Results Thinkers
https://thearmchairfuturist.com/concepts/results-thinkers
Top 5% who ask "What outcome do I need?" Reclaim 15-20 hrs/week. Drive 3x faster adoption.

### The Human Architect
https://thearmchairfuturist.com/concepts/human-architect
The role that bridges AI output and business outcome. Found through Psychology-Led Adoption profiling.

### Pilot-itis
https://thearmchairfuturist.com/concepts/pilot-itis
The disease where AI pilots succeed in isolation and never scale. 67% of AI initiatives never make it past pilot.

---

## About Alex Myers
https://thearmchairfuturist.com/about

Certified Futurist & AI Strategy Advisor based in Portugal.

6 Certifications: FLTA, CCMP, GenAI Academy Expert, CEBP, PSM, PAL.

Expertise Areas: AI Strategy & Adoption, Change Management, Future of Work,
Organizational Design, Digital Transformation, Data Sovereignty, Agile & Scrum,
AI Mentoring, Psychology-Led Adoption, Human-Machine Workflow Design.

## Services & Pricing
https://thearmchairfuturist.com/#services

### We Do It Together (Guidance)
- AI Readiness Assessment: Free, 3 minutes
- 1-on-1 AI Guidance: $120 – $2,000 (single / 5 / 10 / 20-session packs)
- AI Self-Sufficiency Program: $2,497, 8 weeks
- AI Independence Incubator: $12,000, 3 months

### I Do It For You (Implementation)
- Digital Identity Landing Page: $199, 2-4 days
- Custom AI Provisioning: $1,000 – $5,000, 1-2 weeks

### Organizational
- Psychology-Led Adoption Strategy: $10,625, 3-4 weeks

## Case Studies

1. Consulting Firm (2025): 15 hrs/wk reclaimed, 85% adoption, 3.2x ROI in 6 months
2. SaaS Company (2025): 40% support automated, $185K annual savings, 65% Tier-1 reduction
3. Healthcare Network (2024-2025): 92% adoption in 90 days, 35 hrs/month saved
4. DTC E-commerce (2025-2026): 4x content output, 38% lower CPA, +$2.4M Y1 revenue
5. Financial Services (2025-2026): 75% RFP turnaround reduction, $420K BD capacity unlocked
6. Higher Education (2025-2026): 78% faculty adoption, 6 hrs/week average saved

## FAQ

Q: What is the Armchair Futurist? — AI literacy practice, $199–$12,000 range.
Q: What is the Accountability Gap? — Space between AI outputs and business results.
Q: Qualifications? — 6 certs, 40+ AI systems deployed.
Q: Pricing? — $120/session to $12,000. USD and EUR.
Q: International? — Yes, based in Portugal, worldwide.
Q: Results? — 10-20 hrs/week reclaimed, 92% adoption in 90 days.
Q: Custom AI Provisioning? — $1,000–$5,000, 1-2 weeks, OpenClaw/Hermes agents.
Q: How to start? — $199 Digital Identity, $120 session packs, or fit call.
